heading: This Afternoon
text: Periods sunshine, mixing with more clouds as the day goes on. Chance of light mountain snow showers. Highs from the low 20s to near 30 in the north, increasing into the mid to upper 30s as you head south. Light wind, turning northwest at 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Periods of clouds. Chance of a few snow showers over the northern hills. Lows in the teens to near 20, a few 10s in the northeast. Winds diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Sunday
text: Morning sun, mixing with more clouds in the afternoon. A bit milder. Highs in the 30s to near 40 northeast, in the 40s elsewhere. Winds light, becoming southwest 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 20 mph from the Green Mountains west.
